source_campaign.campaign_root_policy: local camera-ready issue1569 smoke campaign root; kept out of tracked evidence
source_campaign.smoke_command: source .venv/bin/activate && uv run python scripts/tools/run_camera_ready_benchmark.py --config configs/benchmarks/issue_1556_amv_actuation_stress_slice_v0.yaml --label issue1569-smoke --output-root <local camera-ready output root> --log-level WARNING
source_campaign.analysis_command: source .venv/bin/activate && uv run python scripts/tools/analyze_camera_ready_campaign.py --campaign-root <local issue1569 smoke campaign root>

interpretation_boundary.summary: Row benchmark_success means the planner rows satisfied the executable benchmark contract; it does not imply episode-level task success or any paper-facing AMV claim.
notes: Fallback, degraded, unavailable, skipped, and failed rows remain non-success evidence; none occurred in this smoke.
AMV coverage remains warn because the resolved scenario rows still expose empty amv metadata blocks in the scenario matrix.

Adapter diagnostics remain caveated: ORCA required high command projection in this smoke, and social_force command-space/projection-policy metadata remains unknown in the underlying campaign output. Follow-up issue #1572 tracks that metadata cleanup.
